chapter_title.en: Questioning in the Grave, Chastisement in the Grave, and Barzakh

text: : سألت أبا عبد الله عليه السلام عن أرواح المؤمنين فقال: في حجرات في الجنة يأكلون من طعامها ويشربون من شرابها ويقولون: ربنا أقم لنا الساعة وانجز لنا ما وعدتنا والحق آخرنا بأولنا.

en.shaykh-tahir-ridha-jaffer: 9.Muḥammad ibn Abī ʿUmayr narrated from ʿAlī, from Abū Baṣīr who said, “I asked Abā ʿAbdillāh (a) about the souls of believers so he said, ‘[They will be] in [lofty] chambers in Paradise, eating of its food and drinking of its drink, and they will say, “Our Lord, bring upon us the Hour [of Judgment] and fulfil for us what You promised us, and make the last among us join the first!”’”
